title: Single Cell Isolation
description: 🎯 Tests the absolute minimum grid size; a single cell dies immediately from underpopulation.

title: The Block (Still Life)
description: 🧱 A classic stable pattern where every cell has exactly 3 neighbors, causing the grid to remain completely unchanged.

title: The Blinker (Oscillator)
description: 🔄 A famous rotating pattern that flips from a horizontal line to a vertical line due to simultaneous death and reproduction.

title: Overpopulation & Corner Reproduction
description: 💥 Tests rule collision: the center cell gets crushed by overpopulation, while all four empty corners spring to life.

title: The Glider Phase 1
description: 🛸 Tests a complex asymmetrical structure that evaluates all 4 rules simultaneously to crawl diagonally across the grid.
